reviews.text: Hannah is our girl! We couldn't have asked for a better documentarian of our day. We felt passionate about preparing for the day but then letting it play out and Hannah was there the whole time to get the timeless shots we needed to pass down to the grandkids as well as the in-the-moment shots that we cherish the most. Hannah will help you feel at ease about your own wedding day which is such an underrated value for a photographer. We will forever cherish the moments that were captured in such beautiful ways by Hannah.

Hannah is absolutely amazing. We HIGHLY recommend choosing her to photograph your special moments!
We first met Hannah at our friends' wedding, where she was photographing their big day. We already knew she was an amazing photographer from seeing their engagement photos but when we met her we knew right away from the kindness and coolness that she exuded that we would love to work with her if we ever got the chance.
Fast forward a few months to when we got engaged, we instantly knew we had to contact Hannah! We were lucky enough to work with her for both our engagement photos and wedding photos. Choosing her as our photographer was the best decision we made!
Hannah is incredibly easy to work with -- she is responsive to emails, super friendly, always professional, and makes you feel so comfortable when you're being photographed. She is also receptive to incorporating specific details or visions that you have into the photos. Not to mention how very talented she is. She brings a ton of experience to the table and her photographs are stunning. All of our photos turned out beautifully and we love how she organized all of our wedding photos into different parts of the day (e.g., details, getting ready, family portraits, ceremony, etc.). We love her documentary-style photographs that capture special moments so perfectly and intimately.
We can't express enough how obsessed we are with each and every photo, and we are so glad that these are the memories we get to keep forever. Stop looking for a photographer -- book Hannah now!

Hannah Henke is an absolute gem of a human being and a beautiful photographer. My husbands and I's wish was to have less posed moments, less pictures of solely us the couple, and more moments captured of our people living and celebrating our day. And boy did Hannah capture precious memories and emotions of our day. On the professional side of things, from the moment I inquired with her, she was super communicative with a phone meet and greet to an eventual in person meeting shortly before our wedding to go over what our wedding day and expectations would look like. If you're looking for a brilliant photographer who specializes in documentary style photos (and even now film pictures I've seen!) and who cares about her work, you've found your person! Cheers to all the couples looking, Hannah's the bees knees. ✨

Hannah is an absolute star. She is incredibly gifted and a true joy to work with. A wedding photographer plays an incredibly intimate role during a wedding and Hannah's calming yet playful presence made our wedding weekend so special. After all the effort, energy and cost of a wedding, please do yourself a favor and hire Hannah to capture the big & small moments so they live on forever

Hire Hannah for your big day, you won't regret it! Hannah came out an photographed an elopement styled shoot at our backcountry hut, Campfire Ranch Red Mountain Pass, and captured both the moment & the venue so perfectly! Hannah is kind, communicative, and has a professional eye to capture the sweetest of moments.
